sqlMap.select: select * from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey LimitAmount DeductibleAmount PolicyExpirationDatePross ProInsPremium IsClaimExpLiability PriorActDatePross IsPerClaim IsPriorActDateFull FirmYear InsuranceCompanyNamePross LimitSequencePross DeductibleSequencePross LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsProfDefenceExpense CreatedDate CreatedBy VersionKey ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #LimitAmount# #DeductibleAmount# #PolicyExpirationDatePross# #ProInsPremium# #IsClaimExpLiability# #PriorActDatePross# #IsPerClaim# #IsPriorActDateFull# #FirmYear# #InsuranceCompanyNamePross# #LimitSequencePross# #DeductibleSequencePross# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsProfDefenceExpense# #CreatedDate# #CreatedBy# #VersionKey# )
sqlMap.select: select LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsProfDefenceExpense, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW set
LimitAmount = #LimitAmount# LimitAmount = null DeductibleAmount = #DeductibleAmount# DeductibleAmount = null PolicyExpirationDatePross = #PolicyExpirationDatePross# PolicyExpirationDatePross = null ProInsPremium = #ProInsPremium# ProInsPremium = null IsClaimExpLiability = #IsClaimExpLiability# IsClaimExpLiability = null PriorActDatePross = #PriorActDatePross# PriorActDatePross = null IsPerClaim = #IsPerClaim# IsPerClaim = null IsPriorActDateFull = #IsPriorActDateFull# IsPriorActDateFull = null FirmYear = #FirmYear# FirmYear = null InsuranceCompanyNamePross = #InsuranceCompanyNamePross# InsuranceCompanyNamePross = null LimitSequencePross = #LimitSequencePross# LimitSequencePross = null DeductibleSequencePross = #DeductibleSequencePross# DeductibleSequencePross = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsProfDefenceExpense = #IsProfDefenceExpense# IsProfDefenceExpense = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsProfDefenceExpense, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, LimitAmount, DeductibleAmount, PolicyExpirationDatePross, ProInsPremium, IsClaimExpLiability, PriorActDatePross, IsPerClaim, IsPriorActDateFull, FirmYear, InsuranceCompanyNamePross, LimitSequencePross, DeductibleSequencePross, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsProfDefenceExpense, CreatedDate, CreatedBy, VersionKey from ProfessionalLiabilityInsDetailLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
